examples.title: Algorithm: Grayscale Conversion
examples.description: Converting an RGB image to grayscale
examples.code:
ALGORITHM GrayscaleConversion
INPUT: RGB image
OUTPUT: Grayscale image

BEGIN
  FOR each pixel in the image
    grayscaleValue = 0.299 * R + 0.587 * G + 0.114 * B
    SET pixel value to grayscaleValue
  END FOR
END
examples.explanation: This algorithm converts an RGB image to grayscale by calculating the weighted sum of the RGB values for each pixel.

examples.title: Python: Grayscale Conversion
examples.description: Converting an RGB image to grayscale using Python
examples.code:
import numpy as np
from PIL import Image

# Load the RGB image
img = Image.open('image.jpg')

# Convert the image to grayscale
grayscale_img = np.dot(img[...,:3], [0.299, 0.587, 0.114])

# Save the grayscale image
Image.fromarray(grayscale_img.astype(np.uint8)).save('grayscale_image.jpg')
examples.explanation: This Python code converts an RGB image to grayscale using the same weighted sum formula as the pseudocode.
